name: Raider
description: Epic Raider is a Salvador class mod from the Borderlands 2 base game.

special.description:
At max level, this class mod provides:

- Assault Rifle max accuracy: +57.5%
- Assault Rifle spread: +57.5%
- Shield capacity: -335,157

Note: While Gunzerking, the assault rifle accuracy bonus only applies to the right-hand weapon. The item card also shows an incorrect assault rifle accuracy value.
